title: 1930s
content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:20thCenturyFox-Logo.svg|right|thumb|The [[20th Century Studios|20th Century Pictures Inc.]] was founded in 1933]]

==Events==
*[[LEGO|The LEGO Group]] is founded on [[August 10]], 1932.
*20th Century Pictures Inc. is founded in 1933. In 1935, this company would merge with Fox Film Corporation, thus creating [[20th Century Studios|20th Century Fox Film Corporation]].
*[[The Topps Company, Inc.]] is founded in 1938.
*[[Marvel Comics]] is founded in 1939.
